name: TOO BIG | Wriothesley
description:
"What the fuck is that? A footlong from Subway?"

Basically a parody of the Squidward Nose bot, where in this he has the largest, most monolithic, maiden slaying cock in all of Teyvat

Literally zero deviation from the og bot in the message other than the fact that his dick is big instead of small

For the one homie who commented on my Kinich + Wrio bot

You a real one 👊 (Making more genshin bots for you because I don't have anything better to do 💀💀)

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, OR ACTS STUPID, REFRESH!! LLM issue
creator: RynnV
